task: Go to the URL and drag the slider completely to the right to complete the task. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/slider-drag.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL. It then correctly identified the slider element and its properties (min, max, current value, and bounding box).
